additive_timing_step2.read: The additive timer is nested and intrusive. Use step.train_step as the real step wall. Child phase totals are useful for attribution, but the full phase sum double-counts nested phases.

mori_aiter_timing_step2.split_rule: call_id > 768, because each step has 12 layers x 32 microbatches x forward/backward = 768 MORI records per rank
mori_aiter_timing_step2.read: MORI timings are GPU-event totals for named MoE/EP stages and should not be added directly to the additive wall. Step 2 still shows MORI owner VJP plus dX return as a major backward target, but it is not the entire 12-layer backward wall.

bottleneck_read: Step 2 is the cleaner profile point: 2,473 tok/GPU/s, 125.23 TFLOPs/GPU, and 202.17 GiB peak logged memory, still only 20.3% of the 12.2k tok/GPU/s target.
Additive step-2 wall is about 52.97 s. The largest child buckets are backward 27.62 s, forward 12.26 s, microbatch wrapper/residual 11.04 s, and loss 1.44 s.
MORI/EP remains a real target: owner-rank expert_loop local VJP is 6.49 s rank-max GPU time for step 2, combine_dx is 1.36 s, and grad-output dispatch is 0.95 s.

The remaining backward after subtracting the main MORI GPU-event buckets is still roughly 18.46 s, so the 12-layer gap also needs decomposition of dense-fallback attention/projections/FSDP/backward wrapper work.
This run still uses the S4096 guarded dense fallback for compressed layers, so it is not evidence for final sparse MLA/LI performance.

reasons: Compressed layers still use guarded dense fallback at S4096.

commands.run: RUN_ID=torchtitan_dsv4_flash12_additive_mori_profile_4x_s4096_gbs128_mbs1_steps2_20260606 TARGET_HOST=do-vunguyen-mi350-gpu REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_MBS=1 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_STEPS=2 CANARY_TORCHTITAN_CONFIG=deepseek_v4_flash_12layer_ceiling_probe_bf16_canary CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_FORWARD_MODE=aiter CANARY_MORI_AITER_SAVE_FORWARD_DISPATCH=true CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=expert_loop CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_AITER_OP_CACHE_MODE=backward CANARY_MORI_AITER_DX_RETURN_MODE=sync CANARY_MORI_AITER_XGRAD_MODE=compact CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_PERSIST_JIT_CACHE=auto CANARY_ENABLE_PROFILING=false CANARY_DSV4_ADDITIVE_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/logs/torchtitan_dsv4_flash12_additive_mori_profile_4x_s4096_gbs128_mbs1_steps2_20260606/additive CANARY_MORI_AITER_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/logs/torchtitan_dsv4_flash12_additive_mori_profile_4x_s4096_gbs128_mbs1_steps2_20260606/mori experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run

validation: Remote node readiness checked with df and rocm-smi before running.
Run completed two optimizer steps with finite loss and grad norm.
Additive timing JSONL and MORI/AITER timing JSONL were copied locally and parsed.
Raw outputs remain outside the repo under /scratch; this file is the compact persisted summary.
next_actions: Profile the step-2 non-MORI backward residual enough to split dense-fallback attention/projections/FSDP communication from Python/autograd wrapper overhead.
Continue MORI/MoE path toward fused grouped owner-rank training backward, because owner VJP plus dX return is still about 8-9 s of step-2 GPU-event time.
Keep sparse MLA/LI work separate until the 12-layer target stops hitting the S4096 guarded dense fallback.
